calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-04-2005 Failure To Post Jury Fees

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-07-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day. This case is consolidated with 315666
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: R. Edwards/E.Estacio, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Salvatore Timpano, Esq. for Plaintiff: Nikolas A. Levenberg, present, was sworn and examined;
No appearances by defendants.

The Court proceeded with case # 315666 - 3 day notice to pay rent; # 185299 - 3 day notice for violation of lease provisions and sub leasing

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff, Maurice S. Kanbar and Elliott S. Kanbar and against defendant Michael Moore as follows:
Back rent: $44,701.69
Holdover damages: $58,383.26
for a total of $103,084.95
costs and fees pursuant to memorandum of costs.

Judgment pending.

May 6, 2005
Judgment granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
